title: dendranthema × sinense
intro: Dendranthema × sinense, also known as Chrysanthemum bupleurum or Sinus Chrysanthemum, is a unique plant species derived from the cross between Dendranthema grandiflorum and Bupleurum chinense. This plant has been valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues such as fever, headache, and respiratory problems due to its antipyretic, analgesic, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dendranthema × sinense include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve immune function, and reduce oxidative stress, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. In terms of herbal preparations, Dendranthema × sinense is often used in tea infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
